pr.title: Complexity MoE v4: Token-Routed I64 + PID + CUDA Scatter + Int6 (26.5M params)

output.summary: Token-routed 4-expert SwiGLU MoE with PID mu dynamics, SGDR warm restarts, and CUDA-native Int6 scatter/gather with sliding-window evaluation.
techniques: Token-routed 4-expert SwiGLU MoE with deterministic modulo routing
PID-inspired mu dynamics across all layers plus SGDR warm restarts
CUDA scatter dispatch with Int6 quant and sliding-window eval
